divisions.title: The Unfinished Conquest
divisions.summary: Israel fails to drive out the nations; a generation forgets the LORD.

divisions.title: Ehud & Deborah
divisions.summary: The first judges: left-handed Ehud, and Deborah and Jael defeating Sisera.

divisions.title: Gideon
divisions.summary: Three hundred men, torches, and trumpets rout Midian.

divisions.title: Abimelech & Jephthah
divisions.summary: Abimelech grasps power by murder; Jephthah’s rash vow costs him everything.

divisions.title: Samson
divisions.summary: The strongest judge, undone by his own appetites, wins his greatest victory in death.

divisions.title: No King in Israel
divisions.summary: Idolatry and atrocity: everyone does what is right in their own eyes.
